    "IsA": [
      "それはSFボードウォーゲームです。"
    ],
    "HasA": [
      "それは戦術ディスプレイを持っています。",
      "それは400個のダイカットカウンターを持っています。",
      "それは2つの時間/距離測定器を持っています。",
      "それはルールブックを持っています。",
      "それはバトルレコードシートのパッドを持っています。",
      "それは2つの6面ダイを持っています。"
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "それは内太陽系の地図を特徴としています。",
      "それは変化する惑星と小惑星の位置を特徴としています。",
      "それは標準的な六角形のグリッドがないことを特徴としています。",
      "それは士気に基づく勝利条件を特徴としています。",
      "それは混合された評価を特徴としています。"
    ],
    "UsedFor": [
      "それは内太陽系の戦闘をシミュレートするために使用されます。",
      "それは裕福な地球の企業が所有する宇宙船を制御するために使用されます。",
      "それは火星と小惑星の鉱夫が使用する宇宙船を制御するために使用されます。",
      "それは標準的な戦術的解決による戦闘の解決に使用されます。",
      "それは簡略化されたテーブルによる戦闘の解決に使用されます。",
      "それは地理的な目標を達成するために使用されます。",
      "それは戦闘に勝利するために使用されます。",
      "それはエージェントとプロパガンダの使用に使用されます。"
    ],
    "LocatedIn": [
      "それは内太陽系にあります。"
    ],

IsA: It is a science fiction board wargame.
HasA: It has a pad of Battle Record sheets.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by a map of the inner Solar System.
It is characterized by changing planet and asteroid positions.
It is characterized by a lack of a standard hex grid.
It is characterized by morale-based victory conditions.
It is characterized by mixed reception.
UsedFor: It is used for simulating combat in the inner Solar System.
It is used for controlling spaceships owned by rich Earth corporations.
It is used for controlling spaceships used by miners on Mars and on asteroids.
It is used for resolving combat through a standard tactical resolution.
It is used for resolving combat via a simplified table.
It is used for gaining geographical objectives.
It is used for winning battles.
It is used for the use of agents and propaganda.
LocatedIn: It is located in the inner Solar System.
InventedBy: It was invented by Brad Hessel.
It was invented by Redmond A. Simonsen.
PublishedIn: It was published in The Space Gamer.
It was published in The Complete Book of Wargames.
It was published in The Wargamer Vol.1 #7.
ProducedBy: It was produced by Simulations Publications, Inc. (SPI).
ConsistsOf: It consists of a map of the inner Solar System.
It consists of a tactical display.
It consists of two time/distance measures.
It consists of a rules booklet.
It consists of a pad of Battle Record sheets.
It consists of two six-sided dice.
PartOf: It is part of a science fiction board wargame.
KnownFor: It is known for simulating space combat in the 21st century.
It is known for its changing map positions.
It is known for morale-based victory conditions.
It is known for being a simulation of a war in space.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with rich Earth corporations.
It is associated with miners on Mars and on asteroids.
It is associated with independence from Terran control.
It is associated with Howard Thompson.
It is associated with Lynn David Wolpert.
It is associated with Eric Goldberg.
It is associated with E.K. Merryweather.
It is associated with Jon Freeman.
OccurredIn: It occurred in the inner Solar System.
About: It is about space combat in the 21st century.
It is about combat in the inner Solar System.
It is about spaceships owned by rich Earth corporations.
It is about spaceships used by miners on Mars and on asteroids.
It is about independence from Terran control.
It is about the changing positions of planets and asteroids.
It is about tactical resolution of combat.
It is about simplified table resolution of combat.
It is about morale.
It is about geographical objectives.
